id.description: The identifier for the stored script or search template.

master_timeout.description: The period to wait for a connection to the master node. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error. It can also be set to `-1` to indicate that the request should never timeout.

timeout.description: The period to wait for a response. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error. It can also be set to `-1` to indicate that the request should never timeout.
